items.title: 3 Unstoppable Stocks You Can Safely Build Your Portfolio Around
items.description: These stocks are behemoths in their respective industries and among the safest stocks you can hold for not only years, but decades.

items.title: Visa and Mastercard Near Deal With Merchants That Would Change Rewards Landscape
items.description: The deal under discussion would lower credit-card interchange fees for merchants, but could make it harder for consumers to use rewards cards at the register.
